insights.text: Protocol Rule #9: After fixing browser errors, AI must clear error log via POST /api/clear-logs so dashboard Orb returns to green
MCP Diet implemented: get_live_record returns summarized data (5 recent insights, components as name+status only). Requires Claude Code restart to load new MCP code.
MCP Diet v2: get_live_record reduced from ~1466 to ~682 tokens (53% more savings). Changes: 1) Components show only non-stable/non-done, 2) Insights without metadata, 3) Goal history limited to 3
Flask prints need flush=True to appear immediately in terminal. Without it, output is buffered and may not show.
8px Grid System: CSS variables for spacing (sp-1 to sp-12), typography (fs-xs to fs-2xl), and border-radius (radius-sm/md/lg). Consistent values across dashboard.

Quality filtering for committed knowledge: 35→19 decisions. Filter by AI-relevance (must contain semantic/atomic/session/mcp/etc keywords), skip UI details (dashboard html, cache headers), require reason >30 chars.
Committed knowledge format v1.0: fixonce_version + project_id at root level for forward compatibility and clone sync identification
Committed knowledge now includes insights.json with strict filter: importance=high OR use_count>=3. Decisions, Avoid, and Insights all support Committed/All toggle in dashboard.
BUGFIX: search_past_solutions now searches debug_sessions. Previously only searched insights, missing all solutions saved via solution_applied().
Opening message UX: ההבדל בין 'דוח' ל'סיפור'. במקום bullet points טכניים (משימה, סטטוס, הבא), לספר סיפור קצר: מה עשינו, למה עצרנו, מה רצינו לבדוק, מה התוצאה. זה יוצר תחושת המשכיות אמיתית.

Opening message v2: שלושה שיפורים - (1) 'איפה עצרנו' צריך להיות ספציפי טכנית, לא כללי (2) סטטיסטיקות כמו '40 החלטות' הן קרות - להחליף במשפט אנושי על מה המערכת זוכרת (3) לסיים עם הצעד הבא הספציפי, לא רק 'רוצה שנמשיך?'
הדשבורד הראשי הוא http://localhost:5000/lite (dashboard_lite.html), לא vnext או app
Session 11-Mar: בדיקות מקיפות הושלמו (17 אוטומטיות + ידניות). תוקן: Safety Point endpoint, Toast במקום alert, Pending sync badge במקום Notify AI. נוקו 12K שורות קוד ישן. Commit 78a5284.
Port sync test - MCP now reads canonical port from ~/.fixonce/runtime.json

Wizard decision: core install success stays separate from AI app connection; dashboard first-run screen will show Claude, Cursor, Codex, and Windsurf with Connected / Needs restart / Not installed / Failed / Retry states.

TODO for pre-release hardening: detect missing or incomplete Python runtime environment during local server startup. Context: manual restart with `python src/server.py --strict-port` failed with `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'flask'` because the active Python environment lacked FixOnce dependencies. Desired future behavior: launcher/repair/diagnostics clearly report 'Python environment missing or incomplete. Install dependencies or recreate the virtual environment.' Not urgent; do not implement now.

2026-06-02 Windows runtime QA harness was created to end the build-install-TestUser debugging loop. Use scripts/windows_runtime_qa.ps1, scripts/windows_runtime_qa.py, and scripts/windows_runtime_audit.py to validate MCP startup, fo_init, fo_search, fo_errors, and Windows subprocess risks before creating an installer. TestUser installer testing is final customer validation, not the primary debugging environment. Validated in TestUser: MCP connected, fo_init succeeds, fo_errors succeeds, fo_search succeeds, previous 120-second fo_search timeout resolved, and dashboard shows MCP connected. Remaining issue: dashboard agent detection still shows Agent=unknown even though Codex successfully executes FixOnce MCP tools.
Users prefer Hebrew UI but English error codes
